summary: Option Cards feature tested - Backend API tests 13/13 passed. Frontend ConciergeThreadPanel with OptionCardMessage component verified. Full flow: Admin sends options → Ticket status changes to options_ready → User can respond → Status changes to in_progress → Soul Score +5.

issues: Thread panel appeared empty on first load - may need loading indicator or message fetch delay

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: SendOptionsRequest model properly validates min 2 options, max 5 options (lines 2089-2095)
Backend: respond_to_options properly updates ticket status from options_ready to in_progress (line 2312)
Backend: Soul Score +5 is granted when user selects option with pet_id (lines 2342-2357)
Frontend: OptionCardMessage component has proper data-testid attributes (line 95)
Frontend: onSelectOption handler uses linkedTicketId when available (lines 516-540)
Backend: get_thread correctly merges option_cards messages from linked tickets (lines 469-493)

success_rate.frontend: 90% (components render, thread panel loads, option card data-testids present)

seed_data_creation: Created test ticket via POST /api/tickets/ for option cards testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Option Cards feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/options/send (admin sends options), POST /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/options/respond (user responds). Frontend component: ConciergeThreadPanel.jsx contains OptionCardMessage component (lines 45-139) with data-testid='option-card-{id}'. Thread panel fetches option cards from linked ticket's messages array.

features_tested.send_options_endpoint: PASS - Returns 200 with options_id, status: options_ready
features_tested.respond_to_options_endpoint: PASS - Returns 200, status changes to in_progress
features_tested.ticket_status_change_on_send: PASS - Status changes from any to options_ready
features_tested.ticket_status_change_on_respond: PASS - Status changes from options_ready to in_progress
features_tested.soul_score_increase: PASS - +5 points when user selects option with pet_id
features_tested.preference_capture: PASS - Preference stored in pet_preferences collection
features_tested.thread_includes_option_messages: PASS - get_thread merges option_cards from linked tickets

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/os/concierge/thread/{thread_id} - Returns messages including option_cards type
